radar.summary_zh: 本文介紹了一項致力於評估和提升 Bielik（一種波蘭 large language model）推理能力的 LMs 研究計畫。該研究描述了多個工作階段：初始基準測試和評估方法的建立，與其他 LLMs 進行比較結果的分析，以及展望未來前景，其中考慮了迄今為止分析的局限性，並旨在讓 Bielik 在不斷變化且競爭激烈的 AI 領域中保持領先地位。
radar.title: Making Bielik LLM Reason (Better): A Field Report
radar.title_zh: 讓 Bielik LLM 更好地推理：一份實地報告

links.title: Disentangling Similarity and Relatedness in Topic Models

primary_link.title: Disentangling Similarity and Relatedness in Topic Models

radar.summary: The recent advancement of large language models has spurred a growing trend of integrating pre-trained language model (PLM) embeddings into topic models, fundamentally reshaping how topics capture semantic structure. Classical models such as Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) derive topics from word co-occurrence statistics, whereas PLM-augmented models anchor these statistics to pre-trained embedding spaces, imposing a prior that also favours clustering of semantically similar words. This struct
radar.summary_zh: Large language models 的最新進展推動了將 pre-trained language model (PLM) embeddings 整合到 topic models 中的趨勢，從根本上重塑了主題捕捉語義結構的方式。像 Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) 這樣的經典模型從詞語共現統計中推導主題，而 PLM-augmented 模型則將這些統計數據錨定到 pre-trained embedding spaces，施加了一個先驗，該先驗也有利於語義相似詞的聚類。這種結構...
radar.title: Disentangling Similarity and Relatedness in Topic Models
radar.title_zh: 在主題模型中解開相似性與關聯性

links.title: SCORE: Replacing Layer Stacking with Contractive Recurrent Depth

primary_link.title: SCORE: Replacing Layer Stacking with Contractive Recurrent Depth

radar.summary: Residual connections are central to modern deep neural networks, enabling stable optimization and efficient information flow across depth. In this work, we propose SCORE (Skip-Connection ODE Recurrent Embedding), a discrete recurrent alternative to classical layer stacking. Instead of composing multiple independent layers, SCORE iteratively applies a single shared neural block using an ODE (Ordinary Differential Equation)-inspired contractive update: ht+1 = (1 - dt) * ht + dt * F(ht) This formul
radar.summary_zh: Residual connections 在現代 deep neural networks 中佔據核心地位，其作用是實現穩定的 optimization 和跨深度的有效 information flow。在這項工作中，我們提出了 SCORE (Skip-Connection ODE Recurrent Embedding)，這是一種離散遞歸的替代方案，取代了傳統的 layer stacking。SCORE 並非由多個獨立的層組成，而是利用 ODE (Ordinary Differential Equation) 啟發的收縮更新，疊代地應用單一共享的 neural block：ht+1 = (1 - dt) * ht + dt * F(ht) 這個公式
radar.title: SCORE: Replacing Layer Stacking with Contractive Recurrent Depth
radar.title_zh: SCORE：用收縮遞歸深度取代層堆疊

links.title: IMTBench: A Multi-Scenario Cross-Modal Collaborative Evaluation Benchmark for In-Image Machine Translation

primary_link.title: IMTBench: A Multi-Scenario Cross-Modal Collaborative Evaluation Benchmark for In-Image Machine Translation

radar.summary: End-to-end In-Image Machine Translation (IIMT) aims to convert text embedded within an image into a target language while preserving the original visual context, layout, and rendering style. However, existing IIMT benchmarks are largely synthetic and thus fail to reflect real-world complexity, while current evaluation protocols focus on single-modality metrics and overlook cross-modal faithfulness between rendered text and model outputs. To address these shortcomings, we present In-image Machine
radar.summary_zh: End-to-end In-Image Machine Translation (IIMT) 旨在將圖像中嵌入的文本轉換為目標語言，同時保留原始的 visual context、layout 和 rendering style。然而，現有的 IIMT benchmarks 大多是合成的，因此無法反映真實世界的複雜性；同時，目前的 evaluation protocols 專注於 single-modality metrics，並忽略了 rendered text 和 model outputs 之間的 cross-modal faithfulness。為了解決這些缺點，我們提出了 In-image Machine
radar.title: IMTBench: A Multi-Scenario Cross-Modal Collaborative Evaluation Benchmark for In-Image Machine Translation
radar.title_zh: IMTBench：一個用於 In-Image Machine Translation 的多場景跨模態協同評估基準

links.title: FAME: Formal Abstract Minimal Explanation for Neural Networks

primary_link.title: FAME: Formal Abstract Minimal Explanation for Neural Networks

radar.summary: We propose FAME (Formal Abstract Minimal Explanations), a new class of abductive explanations grounded in abstract interpretation. FAME is the first method to scale to large neural networks while reducing explanation size. Our main contribution is the design of dedicated perturbation domains that eliminate the need for traversal order. FAME progressively shrinks these domains and leverages LiRPA-based bounds to discard irrelevant features, ultimately converging to a formal abstract minimal expla
radar.summary_zh: 我們提出了 FAME (Formal Abstract Minimal Explanations)，這是一種基於 abstract interpretation 的新型 abductive explanations。FAME 是第一個能夠擴展到大型 neural networks 並同時縮小 explanation size 的方法。我們的主要貢獻在於設計了專用的 perturbation domains，消除了對 traversal order 的需求。FAME 逐步縮小這些 domains，並利用基於 LiRPA 的 bounds 來排除不相關的 features，最終收斂到一個 formal abstract minimal expla
radar.title: FAME: Formal Abstract Minimal Explanation for Neural Networks
radar.title_zh: FAME：神經網路的形式化抽象最小解釋

links.title: Too Vivid to Be Real? Benchmarking and Calibrating Generative Color Fidelity

primary_link.title: Too Vivid to Be Real? Benchmarking and Calibrating Generative Color Fidelity

radar.summary: Recent advances in text-to-image (T2I) generation have greatly improved visual quality, yet producing images that appear visually authentic to real-world photography remains challenging. This is partly due to biases in existing evaluation paradigms: human ratings and preference-trained metrics often favor visually vivid images with exaggerated saturation and contrast, which make generations often too vivid to be real even when prompted for realistic-style images. To address this issue, we presen
radar.summary_zh: Text-to-image (T2I) generation 的最新進展極大地提升了 visual quality，但生成與真實世界攝影在視覺上真實可信的圖像仍然具有挑戰性。這部分原因在於現有 evaluation paradigms 中的偏見：human ratings 和 preference-trained metrics 經常偏愛具有誇張 saturation 和 contrast 的視覺生動圖像，這使得即使在提示生成 realistic-style images 時，生成的圖像也往往過於生動以致不真實。為了解決這個問題，我們提出
radar.title: Too Vivid to Be Real? Benchmarking and Calibrating Generative Color Fidelity
radar.title_zh: 過於生動以致不真實？生成色彩保真度的基準測試與校準

links.title: EvoSchema: Towards Text-to-SQL Robustness Against Schema Evolution

primary_link.title: EvoSchema: Towards Text-to-SQL Robustness Against Schema Evolution

radar.summary: Neural text-to-SQL models, which translate natural language questions (NLQs) into SQL queries given a database schema, have achieved remarkable performance. However, database schemas frequently evolve to meet new requirements. Such schema evolution often leads to performance degradation for models trained on static schemas. Existing work either mainly focuses on simply paraphrasing some syntactic or semantic mappings among NLQ, DB and SQL, or lacks a comprehensive and controllable way to investi
radar.summary_zh: Neural text-to-SQL models 能夠在給定 database schema 的情況下，將 natural language questions (NLQs) 翻譯成 SQL queries，並已取得了顯著的性能。然而，database schemas 經常演變以滿足新的需求。這種 schema evolution 經常導致在 static schemas 上訓練的模型性能下降。現有的工作要麼主要集中於簡單地轉述 NLQ、DB 和 SQL 之間的一些 syntactic 或 semantic mappings，要麼缺乏全面且可控的方式來研究
radar.title: EvoSchema: Towards Text-to-SQL Robustness Against Schema Evolution
radar.title_zh: EvoSchema：實現 Text-to-SQL 對抗 Schema Evolution 的魯棒性

links.title: R4-CGQA: Retrieval-based Vision Language Models for Computer Graphics Image Quality Assessment

primary_link.title: R4-CGQA: Retrieval-based Vision Language Models for Computer Graphics Image Quality Assessment

radar.summary: Immersive Computer Graphics (CGs) rendering has become ubiquitous in modern daily life. However, comprehensively evaluating CG quality remains challenging for two reasons: First, existing CG datasets lack systematic descriptions of rendering quality; and second existing CG quality assessment methods cannot provide reasonable text-based explanations. To address these issues, we first identify six key perceptual dimensions of CG quality from the user perspective and construct a dataset of 3500 CG
radar.summary_zh: 沉浸式 Computer Graphics (CGs) 渲染已在現代日常生活中無處不在。然而，全面評估 CG 品質仍面臨兩大挑戰：首先，現有的 CG datasets 缺乏對渲染品質的系統性描述；其次，現有的 CG quality assessment methods 無法提供合理的基於文字的解釋。為了應對這些問題，我們首先從使用者角度確定了 CG 品質的六個關鍵感知維度，並構建了一個包含 3500 個 CG 的 dataset。
radar.title: R4-CGQA: Retrieval-based Vision Language Models for Computer Graphics Image Quality Assessment
radar.title_zh: R4-CGQA: 基於檢索的 Vision Language Models 用於電腦圖形圖像品質評估

links.title: Human-AI Co-reasoning for Clinical Diagnosis with Evidence-Integrated Language Agent

primary_link.title: Human-AI Co-reasoning for Clinical Diagnosis with Evidence-Integrated Language Agent

radar.summary: We present PULSE, a medical reasoning agent that combines a domain-tuned large language model with scientific literature retrieval to support diagnostic decision-making in complex real-world cases. To evaluate its capabilities, we curated a benchmark of 82 authentic endocrinology case reports encompassing a broad spectrum of disease types and incidence levels. In controlled experiments, we compared PULSE's performance against physicians with varying levels of expertise-from residents to senior s
radar.summary_zh: 我們提出了 PULSE，這是一個醫學推理 agent，它結合了針對特定領域微調的 large language model 和科學文獻檢索，以支援複雜真實世界案例中的診斷決策。為了評估其能力，我們策劃了一個包含 82 個真實內分泌學病例報告的 benchmark，涵蓋了廣泛的疾病類型和發生率水準。在對照實驗中，我們將 PULSE 的性能與不同專業水準的醫師（從住院醫師到資深醫師）進行了比較。
radar.title: Human-AI Co-reasoning for Clinical Diagnosis with Evidence-Integrated Language Agent
radar.title_zh: Human-AI 協同推理與整合證據的 Language Agent 用於臨床診斷

links.title: Ergodicity in reinforcement learning

primary_link.title: Ergodicity in reinforcement learning

radar.summary: In reinforcement learning, we typically aim to optimize the expected value of the sum of rewards an agent collects over a trajectory. However, if the process generating these rewards is non-ergodic, the expected value, i.e., the average over infinitely many trajectories with a given policy, is uninformative for the average over a single, but infinitely long trajectory. Thus, if we care about how the individual agent performs during deployment, the expected value is not a good optimization object
radar.summary_zh: 在 reinforcement learning 中，我們通常旨在優化 agent 在一個 trajectory 中收集到的獎勵總和的預期值。然而，如果產生這些獎勵的過程是非遍歷的 (non-ergodic)，那麼預期值，即在給定 policy 下無限多個 trajectories 的平均值，對於單一但無限長的 trajectory 的平均值來說是沒有資訊量的。因此，如果我們關心 individual agent 在部署時的表現，預期值並不是一個好的 optimization object。
radar.title: Ergodicity in reinforcement learning
radar.title_zh: reinforcement learning 中的遍歷性 (Ergodicity)

links.title: Guiding Diffusion Models with Semantically Degraded Conditions

primary_link.title: Guiding Diffusion Models with Semantically Degraded Conditions

radar.summary: Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) is a cornerstone of modern text-to-image models, yet its reliance on a semantically vacuous null prompt ($\varnothing$) generates a guidance signal prone to geometric entanglement. This is a key factor limiting its precision, leading to well-documented failures in complex compositional tasks. We propose Condition-Degradation Guidance (CDG), a novel paradigm that replaces the null prompt with a strategically degraded condition, $\boldsymbol{c}_{\text{deg}}$. This re
radar.summary_zh: Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) 是現代 text-to-image models 的基石，然而其對語義空泛的 null prompt ($\varnothing$) 的依賴會產生容易發生幾何糾纏的 guidance signal。這是限制其精確度的關鍵因素，導致在複雜的 compositional tasks 中出現許多已被記錄的失敗。我們提出 Condition-Degradation Guidance (CDG)，這是一種新穎的範式，它用策略性降級的條件 $ oldsymbol{c}_{	ext{deg}}$ 來取代 null prompt。
radar.title: Guiding Diffusion Models with Semantically Degraded Conditions
radar.title_zh: 使用語義降級條件引導 Diffusion Models

links.title: Adaptive RAN Slicing Control via Reward-Free Self-Finetuning Agents

primary_link.title: Adaptive RAN Slicing Control via Reward-Free Self-Finetuning Agents

radar.summary: The integration of Generative AI models into AI-native network systems offers a transformative path toward achieving autonomous and adaptive control. However, the application of such models to continuous control tasks is impeded by intrinsic architectural limitations, including finite context windows, the lack of explicit reward signals, and the degradation of the long context. This paper posits that the key to unlocking robust continuous control is enabling agents to internalize experience by d
radar.summary_zh: 將 Generative AI models 整合到 AI-native network systems 中，為實現自主和 Adaptive control 提供了一條變革性的途徑。然而，這類 models 在連續控制任務中的應用受到內在架構限制的阻礙，包括有限的 context windows、缺乏明確的 reward signals 以及 long context 的退化。本文提出，實現穩健連續控制的關鍵在於使 agents 能夠透過內化經驗來達成。
radar.title: Adaptive RAN Slicing Control via Reward-Free Self-Finetuning Agents
radar.title_zh: 透過 Reward-Free Self-Finetuning Agents 實現 Adaptive RAN Slicing Control

links.title: Historical Consensus: Preventing Posterior Collapse via Iterative Selection of Gaussian Mixture Priors

primary_link.title: Historical Consensus: Preventing Posterior Collapse via Iterative Selection of Gaussian Mixture Priors

radar.summary: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) frequently suffer from posterior collapse, where latent variables become uninformative and the approximate posterior degenerates to the prior. Recent work has characterized this phenomenon as a phase transition governed by the spectral properties of the data covariance matrix. In this paper, we propose a fundamentally different approach: instead of avoiding collapse through architectural constraints or hyperparameter tuning, we eliminate the possibility of collaps
radar.summary_zh: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) 經常遭受 posterior collapse 的問題，在此情況下，latent variables 變得不具資訊性，且近似後驗退化為先驗。最近的研究將此現象描述為一種由 data covariance matrix 的譜特性所支配的相變。在本文中，我們提出了一種根本不同的方法：我們不是透過 architectural constraints 或 hyperparameter tuning 來避免崩潰，而是消除了崩潰的可能性。
radar.title: Historical Consensus: Preventing Posterior Collapse via Iterative Selection of Gaussian Mixture Priors
radar.title_zh: 歷史共識：透過迭代選擇 Gaussian Mixture Priors 來防止 Posterior Collapse

links.title: An Extreme Multi-label Text Classification (XMTC) Library Dataset: What if we took "Use of Practical AI in Digital Libraries" seriously?

primary_link.title: An Extreme Multi-label Text Classification (XMTC) Library Dataset: What if we took "Use of Practical AI in Digital Libraries" seriously?

radar.summary: Subject indexing is vital for discovery but hard to sustain at scale and across languages. We release a large bilingual (English/German) corpus of catalog records annotated with the Integrated Authority File (GND), plus a machine-actionable GND taxonomy. The resource enables ontology-aware multi-label classification, mapping text to authority terms, and agent-assisted cataloging with reproducible, authority-grounded evaluation. We provide a brief statistical profile and qualitative error analyse
radar.summary_zh: 主題索引對於發現至關重要，但在規模化和跨語言方面難以維持。我們發布了一個大型雙語（英文/德文）目錄記錄語料庫，該語料庫使用 Integrated Authority File (GND) 進行註釋，並包含一個機器可操作的 GND taxonomy。該資源支援 ontology-aware multi-label classification，將文本映射到 authority terms，以及具有可重現、權威基礎評估的 agent-assisted cataloging。我們提供了一個簡要的統計概況和定性錯誤分析。
radar.title: An Extreme Multi-label Text Classification (XMTC) Library Dataset: What if we took "Use of Practical AI in Digital Libraries" seriously?
radar.title_zh: 一個 Extreme Multi-label Text Classification (XMTC) 圖書館資料集：如果我們認真對待「AI 在數位圖書館的實際應用」會怎樣？

links.title: A Grammar of Machine Learning Workflows

primary_link.title: A Grammar of Machine Learning Workflows

radar.summary: Data leakage affected 294 published papers across 17 scientific fields (Kapoor & Narayanan, 2023). The dominant response has been documentation: checklists, linters, best-practice guides. Documentation does not prevent these failures. This paper proposes a structural remedy: a grammar that decomposes the supervised learning lifecycle into 7 kernel primitives connected by a typed directed acyclic graph (DAG), with four hard constraints that reject the two most damaging leakage classes at call tim
radar.summary_zh: Data leakage 影響了 17 個科學領域的 294 篇已發表論文 (Kapoor & Narayanan, 2023)。主要的應對措施是文件化：清單、linters、最佳實踐指南。文件化並不能防止這些錯誤。本文提出了一種結構性補救措施：一種語法，將 supervised learning 的生命週期分解為由 typed directed acyclic graph (DAG) 連接的 7 個 kernel primitives，並具有四個硬性約束，可在呼叫時拒絕兩種最具破壞性的 leakage 類別。
radar.title: A Grammar of Machine Learning Workflows
radar.title_zh: Machine Learning 工作流程的語法

links.title: Beyond Accuracy: Reliability and Uncertainty Estimation in Convolutional Neural Networks

primary_link.title: Beyond Accuracy: Reliability and Uncertainty Estimation in Convolutional Neural Networks

radar.summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have become integral to a wide range of scientific and practical applications due to their flexibility and strong predictive performance. Despite their accuracy, however, DNNs frequently exhibit poor calibration, often assigning overly confident probabilities to incorrect predictions. This limitation underscores the growing need for integrated mechanisms that provide reliable uncertainty estimation. In this article, we compare two prominent approaches for uncertainty
radar.summary_zh: Deep neural networks (DNNs) 因其靈活性和強大的預測性能，已成為各種科學和實際應用中不可或缺的一部分。然而，儘管 DNNs 具有準確性，它們卻經常表現出較差的 calibration，常常對不正確的預測賦予過於自信的機率。這一局限性突顯了對提供可靠 uncertainty estimation 的整合機制日益增長的需求。在本文中，我們比較了兩種著名的不確定性方法。
radar.title: Beyond Accuracy: Reliability and Uncertainty Estimation in Convolutional Neural Networks
radar.title_zh: 超越準確性：Convolutional Neural Networks 中的可靠性和不確定性估計

links.title: Repurposing Backdoors for Good: Ephemeral Intrinsic Proofs for Verifiable Aggregation in Cross-silo Federated Learning

primary_link.title: Repurposing Backdoors for Good: Ephemeral Intrinsic Proofs for Verifiable Aggregation in Cross-silo Federated Learning

radar.summary_zh: 雖然 Secure Aggregation (SA) 在 Cross-silo Federated Learning 中保護了更新的機密性，但它未能保證聚合的完整性，允許惡意伺服器靜默地省略或篡改更新。現有的可驗證聚合方案依賴於重量級密碼學 (例如，ZKPs, HE)，產生隨模型大小擴展性差的計算成本。在本文中，我們提出了一種輕量級架構，它從 extrinsic cryptographic proofs 轉向 Intrinsic Proofs。我們 r
radar.title: Repurposing Backdoors for Good: Ephemeral Intrinsic Proofs for Verifiable Aggregation in Cross-silo Federated Learning
radar.title_zh: 將後門重新用於善意目的：Cross-silo Federated Learning 中可驗證聚合的 Ephemeral Intrinsic Proofs

links.title: CodePercept: Code-Grounded Visual STEM Perception for MLLMs

primary_link.title: CodePercept: Code-Grounded Visual STEM Perception for MLLMs

top5.summary: When MLLMs fail at Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics (STEM) visual reasoning, a fundamental question arises: is it due to perceptual deficiencies or reasoning limitations? Through systematic scaling analysis that independently scales perception and reasoning components, we uncover a critical insight: scaling perception consistently outperforms scaling reasoning. This reveals perception as the true lever limiting current STEM visual reasoning. Motivated by this insight, our work focuses on systematically enhancing the perception capabilities of MLLMs by establishing code as a powerful perceptual medium--executable code provides precise semantics that naturally align with the structured nature of STEM visuals. Specifically, we construct ICC-1M, a large-scale dataset comprising 1M Image-Caption-Code triplets that materializes this code-as-perception paradigm through two complementary approaches: (1) Code-Grounded Caption Generation treats executable code as ground truth for image captions, eliminating the hallucinations inherent in existing knowledge distillation methods; (2) STEM Image-to-Code Translation prompts models to generate reconstruction code, mitigating the ambiguity of natural language for perception enhancement. To validate this paradigm, we further introduce STEM2Code-Eval, a novel benchmark that directly evaluates visual perception in STEM domains. Unlike existing work relying on problem-solving accuracy as a proxy that only measures problem-relevant understanding, our benchmark requires comprehensive visual comprehension through executable code generation for image reconstruction, providing deterministic and verifiable assessment. Code is available at https://github.com/TongkunGuan/Qwen-CodePercept.
top5.summary_zh: 當 MLLMs 在科學、技術、工程和數學 (STEM) 視覺推理方面失敗時，一個基本問題就出現了：這是由於感知缺陷還是推理限制造成的？透過獨立擴展感知和推理組件的系統性擴展分析，我們揭示了一個關鍵見解：擴展感知始終優於擴展推理。這表明感知是限制當前 STEM 視覺推理的真正關鍵因素。受此啟發，我們的工作專注於透過將程式碼建立為強大的感知媒介來系統性地增強 MLLMs 的感知能力——可執行程式碼提供了精確的語義，自然地與 STEM 視覺的結構性質相符。具體來說，我們構建了 ICC-1M，一個包含 100 萬個 Image-Caption-Code 三元組的大規模資料集，透過兩種互補方法實現了這種「程式碼即感知」範式：(1) Code-Grounded Caption Generation 將可執行程式碼視為圖像標題的 ground truth，消除了現有 knowledge distillation 方法中固有的幻覺；(2) STEM Image-to-Code Translation 提示模型生成重建程式碼，減輕了自然語言在感知增強方面的歧義。為了驗證這一範式，我們進一步引入了 STEM2Code-Eval，這是一個直接評估 STEM 領域視覺感知的新型基準。與依賴於問題解決準確性作為僅衡量問題相關理解的代理的現有工作不同，我們的基準透過用於圖像重建的可執行程式碼生成來要求全面的視覺理解，提供了確定且可驗證的評估。程式碼可在 https://github.com/TongkunGuan/Qwen-CodePercept 取得。
top5.title: CodePercept: Code-Grounded Visual STEM Perception for MLLMs
top5.title_zh: CodePercept：適用於 MLLMs 的程式碼基礎視覺 STEM 感知

links.title: V_{0.5}: Generalist Value Model as a Prior for Sparse RL Rollouts

primary_link.title: V_{0.5}: Generalist Value Model as a Prior for Sparse RL Rollouts

top5.summary: In Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), constructing a robust advantage baseline is critical for policy gradients, effectively guiding the policy model to reinforce desired behaviors. Recent research has introduced Generalist Value Models (such as V_0), which achieve pre-trained value estimation by explicitly encoding model capabilities in-context, eliminating the need to synchronously update the value model alongside the policy model. In this paper, we propose V_{0.5}, which adaptively fuses the baseline predicted by such value model (acting as a prior) with the empirical mean derived from sparse rollouts. This constructs a robust baseline that balances computational efficiency with extremely low variance. Specifically, we introduce a real-time statistical testing and dynamic budget allocation. This balances the high variance caused by sparse sampling against the systematic bias (or hallucinations) inherent in the value model's prior. By constructing a hypothesis test to evaluate the prior's reliability in real-time, the system dynamically allocates additional rollout budget on demand. This mechanism minimizes the baseline estimator's Mean Squared Error (MSE), guaranteeing stable policy gradients, even under extreme sparsity with a group size of 4. Extensive evaluations across six mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that V_{0.5} significantly outperforms GRPO and DAPO, achieving faster convergence and over some 10% performance improvement.
top5.summary_zh: 在可驗證獎勵強化學習 (RLVR) 中，構建一個穩健的 advantage baseline 對於 policy gradients 至關重要，它能有效地引導 policy model 強化所需行為。最近的研究引入了 Generalist Value Models（例如 V_0），它們透過在上下文中明確編碼模型能力來實現預訓練的價值估計，消除了與 policy model 同步更新 value model 的需要。在本文中，我們提出了 V_{0.5}，它將此類 value model 預測的 baseline（作為 prior）與稀疏 rollouts 導出的經驗平均值自適應地融合。這構建了一個穩健的 baseline，平衡了計算效率與極低的變異數。具體來說，我們引入了即時統計檢定和動態預算分配。這平衡了稀疏採樣引起的高變異數與 value model 的 prior 中固有的系統偏差（或幻覺）。透過構建假設檢定來即時評估 prior 的可靠性，系統會根據需求動態分配額外的 rollout 預算。這種機制最大程度地減少了 baseline estimator 的 Mean Squared Error (MSE)，即使在組大小為 4 的極端稀疏情況下，也能確保 policy gradients 的穩定性。對六個數學推理基準的廣泛評估表明，V_{0.5} 顯著優於 GRPO 和 DAPO，實現了更快的收斂速度和超過 10% 的性能提升。
top5.title: V_{0.5}: Generalist Value Model as a Prior for Sparse RL Rollouts
top5.title_zh: V_{0.5}：作為稀疏 RL Rollouts 先驗的通用價值模型

links.title: LLM2Vec-Gen: Generative Embeddings from Large Language Models

primary_link.title: LLM2Vec-Gen: Generative Embeddings from Large Language Models

top5.summary: LLM-based text embedders typically encode the semantic content of their input. However, embedding tasks require mapping diverse inputs to similar outputs. Typically, this input-output is addressed by training embedding models with paired data using contrastive learning. In this work, we propose a novel self-supervised approach, LLM2Vec-Gen, which adopts a different paradigm: rather than encoding the input, we learn to represent the model's potential response. Specifically, we add trainable special tokens to the LLM's vocabulary, append them to input, and optimize them to represent the LLM's response in a fixed-length sequence. Training is guided by the LLM's own completion for the query, along with an unsupervised embedding teacher that provides distillation targets. This formulation helps to bridge the input-output gap and transfers LLM capabilities such as safety alignment and reasoning to embedding tasks. Crucially, the LLM backbone remains frozen and training requires only unlabeled queries. LLM2Vec-Gen achieves state-of-the-art self-supervised performance on the Massive Text Embedding Benchmark (MTEB), improving by 9.3% over the best unsupervised embedding teacher. We also observe up to 43.2% reduction in harmful content retrieval and 29.3% improvement in reasoning capabilities for embedding tasks. Finally, the learned embeddings are interpretable and can be decoded into text to reveal their semantic content.
top5.summary_zh: 基於 LLM 的文字嵌入器通常會編碼其輸入的語義內容。然而，嵌入任務需要將多樣化的輸入映射到相似的輸出。通常，這種輸入-輸出關係是透過使用 contrastive learning，利用成對資料訓練嵌入模型來解決的。在這項工作中，我們提出了一種新穎的自監督方法 LLM2Vec-Gen，它採用了不同的範式：我們學習表示模型的潛在回應，而不是編碼輸入。具體來說，我們將可訓練的 special tokens 添加到 LLM 的詞彙表中，將它們附加到輸入中，並優化它們以在固定長度序列中表示 LLM 的回應。訓練由 LLM 對查詢的自身補全以及提供 distillation targets 的無監督 embedding teacher 引導。這種公式化有助於彌合輸入-輸出差距，並將 LLM 的能力（例如 safety alignment 和推理）轉移到嵌入任務中。至關重要的是，LLM backbone 保持凍結狀態，訓練僅需要未標記的查詢。LLM2Vec-Gen 在 Massive Text Embedding Benchmark (MTEB) 上取得了最先進的自監督性能，比最佳的無監督 embedding teacher 提高了 9.3%。我們還觀察到有害內容檢索減少了 43.2%，嵌入任務的推理能力提高了 29.3%。最後，學習到的 embeddings 是可解釋的，並且可以解碼成文字以揭示其語義內容。
top5.title: LLM2Vec-Gen: Generative Embeddings from Large Language Models
top5.title_zh: LLM2Vec-Gen：源自大型語言模型的生成式嵌入

links.title: Prism-Δ: Differential Subspace Steering for Prompt Highlighting in Large Language Models

primary_link.title: Prism-Δ: Differential Subspace Steering for Prompt Highlighting in Large Language Models

top5.summary: Prompt highlighting steers a large language model to prioritize user-specified text spans during generation. A key challenge is extracting steering directions that capture the difference between relevant and irrelevant contexts, rather than shared structural patterns common to both. We propose PRISM-Δ (Projection-based Relevance-Informed Steering Method), which decomposes the difference between positive and negative cross-covariance matrices to maximize discriminative energy while eliminating shared directions. Each attention head receives a continuous softplus importance weight, letting weak-but-useful heads contribute at reduced strength. The framework extends naturally to Value representations, capturing content-channel signal that Key-only methods leave unused. Across four benchmarks and five models, PRISM-Δ matches or exceeds the best existing method on 19 of 20 configurations, with relative gains up to +10.6%, while halving the fluency cost of steering. PRISM-Δ also scales to long-context retrieval, outperforming the best existing method by up to +4.8% relative gain. PRISM-Δ is compatible with FlashAttention and adds negligible memory overhead.
top5.summary_zh: Prompt highlighting 引導大型語言模型在生成過程中優先考慮用戶指定的文字範圍。一個關鍵挑戰是提取能夠捕捉相關和不相關上下文之間差異的引導方向，而不是兩者共有的共享結構模式。我們提出了 PRISM-Δ（基於投影的相關性資訊引導方法），它分解了正負 cross-covariance matrices 之間的差異，以最大化鑑別能量，同時消除共享方向。每個 attention head 接收一個連續的 softplus 重要性權重，讓弱但有用的 head 以較低的強度貢獻。該框架自然地擴展到 Value representations，捕捉 Key-only 方法未使用的內容通道訊號。在四個基準測試和五個模型中，PRISM-Δ 在 20 種配置中的 19 種上與現有最佳方法持平或超越，相對增益高達 +10.6%，同時將引導的流暢性成本減半。PRISM-Δ 也可擴展到長上下文檢索，比現有最佳方法高出高達 +4.8% 的相對增益。PRISM-Δ 與 FlashAttention 相容，並增加了可忽略的記憶體開銷。
top5.title: Prism-Δ: Differential Subspace Steering for Prompt Highlighting in Large Language Models
top5.title_zh: Prism-Δ：用於大型語言模型 Prompt Highlighting 的差分子空間引導
